attractions.name: Bhakta Hanuman Temple
attractions.description: Located in the misty mountains of Ramboda, this temple is linked to the Ramayana legend
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Ramboda Falls Viewpoint
attractions.description: A beautiful photo stop to see cascading waterfalls
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Seetha Amman Temple
attractions.description: Believed to be where Seetha was held captive by Ravana
attractions.hours: Morning: 8:00 AM – 1:00 PM, Afternoon/Evening: 2:00 PM – 6:30 PM, Temple is closed daily from 1:00 PM to 2:00 PM
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Srilanka/Mr. Gagandeep_All Inclusive Guide_Srilanka.pdf

attractions.name: Divurumpola Temple
attractions.description: Said to be where Seetha underwent a fire trial
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Gayathri Peedam
attractions.description: A peaceful, lesser-known site visited by many spiritual seekers
attractions.hours: Morning session: 7:00 AM – 12:00 PM, Afternoon / Evening session: 3:30 PM – 8:00 PM
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Victoria Park
attractions.description: Lovely for an evening stroll with well-kept gardens and exotic plants
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Gregory Lake
attractions.description: Option for boating, cycling, or pony rides
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Srilanka/Mr. Gagandeep_All Inclusive Guide_Srilanka.pdf

attractions.name: Ramboda Falls
attractions.description: One of Sri Lanka's tallest waterfalls, Ramboda plunges dramatically down a forested cliffside. The cool mist in the air, the sound of rushing water, and the surrounding tea plantations create a cinematic mountain landscape.
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Gagandeep_All Inclusive Guide_Srilanka.pdf

attractions.name: Sri Bhakta Hanuman Temple
attractions.description: Perched amid tea estates and misty hills, this temple is linked to the Ramayana legend. It's believed Hanuman rested here during his search for Sita.
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Gagandeep_All Inclusive Guide_Srilanka.pdf

attractions.name: Hakgala Botanical Garden
attractions.description: Known for its roses and temperate flora, Hakgala is one of the highest botanical gardens in the world. Stone pathways wind through vibrant flower beds, fern gardens, and towering trees.
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Gagandeep_All Inclusive Guide_Srilanka.pdf
